underlying_goal: Fix logo sizes in .gallery-logos to appear visually uniform and then add padding/margin to the container
friction_detail: First CSS attempt using max-height without object-fit didn't fix the issue for very wide logos like El Mundo.
brief_summary: User wanted logos in .gallery-logos to appear visually uniform in size, and the assistant solved it with object-fit:contain plus fixed dimensions, then added vertical padding per user's follow-up request.
